name: TSHA: A Benchmark for Visual Language Models in Trustworthy Safety Hazard Assessment Scenarios

description: arXiv:2603.29759v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models (VLMs) have accelerated their application to indoor safety hazards assessment. However, existing benchmarks suffer from three fundamental limitations: (1) heavy reliance on synthetic datasets constructed via simulation software, creating a significant domain gap with real-world environments; (2)...
author: Qiucheng Yu, Ruijie Xu, Mingang Chen, Jianfeng Dong, Xin Tan
